text.title: VUI Testing Best Practices Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying VUI Testing Best Practices to a concrete case.

section.title: EN-US + EN-GB Alexa skill regression

example.code:
Report: 2026-05-23. ASR: whisper-large-v3.
Tier-1 deterministic (EN-US): - intent_f1: 0.94 / slot_f1: 0.89 / dialog_completion: 87%
Tier-2 LLM-judge (EN-US, blind): - naturalness 4.2 / error_recovery 4.0 / goal_completion 0.85
EN-GB rerun: intent F1 drops to 0.81 — locale-leaking copy detected in 3 prompts.
Suite tier: full (nightly). Smoke tier (every commit) ran 10 utterances in <2 min.

section.note: Two tiers reported independently; locale rerun catches what monolingual would miss.
